# SSLSessionOption.breakOnCertRequested

**Case**

Enables returning from [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SSLHandshake(_:)] (with a result of `errSSLClientCertRequested`) when the server requests a client certificate.

## Declaration

```swift
case breakOnCertRequested
```
title: SSLSessionOption.breakOnCertRequested
